## Publishable package checklist

Only if this PR changes the published Composer package:

- [ ] Version bumped / release noted per [`PUBLISHING.md`](../PUBLISHING.md)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Docs / README updated if user-facing behavior changed
